summary: Current-head result artifacts are valid, but several structured observations overclaim what the executed tests demonstrate.
inspection_summary: Reviewed HEAD 22b8ce2, verification evidence, raw 42/13/55 result artifacts, target tests, Story, architecture, contracts, traceability, and judgment artifacts without rerunning tests.

findings.detail: Adjacent E2E tests do not execute the Guarded Run flow or reconstruct its persisted artifacts; add a real Guarded Run E2E or narrow the claim.
Runtime-cost, PR lifecycle, and managed-worktree responsibility labels exceed the directly exercised contract surface; use corresponding regression tests and accurate scope.
Deadline expiry/advisory behavior and post-pr_ready Gate evidence degradation are not directly asserted.
